requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Label — SREDA Direction for Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——SREDA针对空调器的指引方向
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——SREDA針對空調器的指引方向

summary.en: Bangladesh's Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA), operating under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Master Plan, is directing mandatory energy efficiency labelling for air conditioners in Bangladesh. The labelling framework for air conditioners follows a star-rating or similar efficiency tier system intended to align with IEC efficiency testing methodologies and BDS adopted standards. While the Bangladesh programme is at a developing stage, importers of air conditioners and heat pumps should confirm current SREDA mandatory label scope, applicable efficiency test standards, and label format requirements before shipment, as obligations can be activated or revised by ministerial notification.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国可持续和可再生能源发展局（SREDA）依据《能源效率和节能总体规划》推进空调器强制能效标签工作。空调器标签框架采用星级或类似效率等级体系，旨在与IEC效率测试方法和BDS采标标准接轨。孟加拉国该计划仍处于发展阶段，空调器和热泵进口商在出货前应确认SREDA当前强制标签范围、适用效率测试标准和标签格式要求，因相关义务可由部令启动或修订。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國可持續和可再生能源發展局（SREDA）依據《能源效率和節能總體規劃》推進空調器強制能效標籤工作。空調器標籤框架採用星級或類似效率等級體系，旨在與IEC效率測試方法和BDS採標標準接軌。孟加拉國該計劃仍處於發展階段，空調器和熱泵進口商在出貨前應確認SREDA當前強制標籤範圍、適用效率測試標準和標籤格式要求，因相關義務可由部令啟動或修訂。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Energy Efficiency and Conservation Master Plan
SREDA mandatory energy efficiency label direction for air conditioners
BDS adopted IEC efficiency test standards for air conditioners

summary.en: China requires energy efficiency labels on room air conditioners under GB 12021.3 and GB 4294, with efficiency grades determined by COP, SEER, or SCOP testing under GB/T 7725 and GB 25454. Chinese energy labels and efficiency test reports are not accepted as Bangladesh SREDA label documentation.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 12021.3和GB 4294对房间空调器实施强制能效标签，效率等级依据GB/T 7725和GB 25454的COP、SEER或SCOP测试确定。中国能效标签和效率检测报告不被接受为孟加拉国SREDA标签文件。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 12021.3和GB 4294對房間空調器實施強制能效標籤，效率等級依據GB/T 7725和GB 25454的COP、SEER或SCOP測試確定。中國能效標籤和效率檢測報告不被接受為孟加拉國SREDA標籤文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.3 (energy label for room air conditioners)

gap.en: China's energy label and efficiency test results are not accepted as Bangladesh SREDA label documentation. Exporters should confirm whether SREDA mandatory labelling has been activated for the target product category, obtain efficiency test data to applicable BDS/IEC standards if required, and apply a Bangladesh-format energy label before importation. The SREDA programme scope and timeline should be verified with current official sources before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国能效标签和效率测试结果不被接受为孟加拉国SREDA标签文件。出口商应确认SREDA强制标签是否已针对目标产品类别启动，如需要则按BDS/IEC标准获取效率测试数据，并在进口前加贴孟加拉国格式的能效标签。出货前应通过当前官方来源核实SREDA计划范围和时间表。
gap.zht: 中國能效標籤和效率測試結果不被接受為孟加拉國SREDA標籤文件。出口商應確認SREDA強制標籤是否已針對目標產品類別啟動，如需要則按BDS/IEC標準獲取效率測試數據，並在進口前加貼孟加拉國格式的能效標籤。出貨前應通過當前官方來源核實SREDA計劃範圍和時間表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or pending mandatory — SREDA energy efficiency label direction for air conditioners; scope and activation status should be verified with current official sources
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 12021.3 for room air conditioners; not equivalent to Bangladesh SREDA label

source.publisher: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA), Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — SREDA energy efficiency labelling for air conditioners is an active policy direction in Bangladesh; exporters must confirm current mandatory scope and apply Bangladesh-format labels where required; Chinese GB energy labels are not accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——SREDA空调器能效标签是孟加拉国的现行政策方向；出口商须确认当前强制范围，并在需要时加贴孟加拉国格式标签；中国GB能效标签不予受理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——SREDA空調器能效標籤是孟加拉國的現行政策方向；出口商須確認當前強制範圍，並在需要時加貼孟加拉國格式標籤；中國GB能效標籤不予受理。

requirement_topic.en: BERC Grid Connection and Import Approval for Electrical Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: BERC电气设备并网及进口审批
requirement_topic.zht: BERC電氣設備並網及進口審批

summary.en: The Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission (BERC), established under the Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission Act 2003, regulates the electricity sector including grid-connected equipment standards and import approvals for certain electrical devices. Heat pumps and large air-conditioning equipment connected to the grid may require BERC clearance or compliance confirmation depending on rated capacity and installation context. Grid voltage in Bangladesh is 220 V (single-phase) and 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz, identical to China, giving Chinese heat pump products excellent electrical compatibility on voltage and frequency.
summary.zh: 依据2003年《孟加拉国能源监管委员会法》设立的孟加拉国能源监管委员会（BERC）负责监管电力行业，包括并网设备标准和特定电气设备的进口审批。并网热泵和大型空调设备根据额定容量和安装情形，可能需要获得BERC许可或符合性确认。孟加拉国电网电压为220 V（单相）和380 V（三相），频率50 Hz，与中国相同，中国热泵产品在电压和频率方面具有优良的电气兼容性。
summary.zht: 依據2003年《孟加拉國能源監管委員會法》設立的孟加拉國能源監管委員會（BERC）負責監管電力行業，包括並網設備標準和特定電氣設備的進口審批。並網熱泵和大型空調設備根據額定容量和安裝情形，可能需要獲得BERC許可或符合性確認。孟加拉國電網電壓為220 V（單相）和380 V（三相），頻率50 Hz，與中國相同，中國熱泵產品在電壓和頻率方面具有優良的電氣相容性。

standards_or_laws: BERC grid connection and equipment import regulations
Bangladesh grid: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China operates at 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz — identical to Bangladesh. Chinese heat pumps designed for the domestic GB 9706 and GB 25454 framework are voltage- and frequency-compatible with Bangladesh's grid without modification. Grid-side approvals in China are administered through the National Energy Administration (NEA) and local utilities, which are separate from BERC.
summary.zh: 中国电网为220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），频率50 Hz，与孟加拉国完全相同。按中国国内GB 9706和GB 25454框架设计的中国热泵产品无需改造即可与孟加拉国电网在电压和频率上兼容。中国的电网侧审批由国家能源局（NEA）和地方电力公司负责，与BERC体系不同。
summary.zht: 中國電網為220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），頻率50 Hz，與孟加拉國完全相同。按中國國內GB 9706和GB 25454框架設計的中國熱泵產品無需改造即可與孟加拉國電網在電壓和頻率上相容。中國的電網側審批由國家能源局（NEA）和地方電力公司負責，與BERC體系不同。

gap.en: Grid voltage and frequency compatibility is excellent — no hardware modification required for 220 V / 50 Hz products. The gap is regulatory: BERC grid-connection or import approval obligations for heat pumps above certain rated capacity thresholds should be confirmed with BERC before importation. Chinese NEA approvals and CCC certificates do not substitute BERC clearances.
gap.zh: 电网电压和频率兼容性优良——220 V / 50 Hz产品无需硬件改造。差距在于监管层面：超过特定额定容量阈值的热泵的BERC并网或进口审批义务应在进口前向BERC确认。中国国家能源局审批和CCC证书不能替代BERC许可。
gap.zht: 電網電壓和頻率相容性優良——220 V / 50 Hz產品無需硬體改造。差距在於監管層面：超過特定額定容量閾值的熱泵的BERC並網或進口審批義務應在進口前向BERC確認。中國國家能源局審批和CCC證書不能替代BERC許可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where BERC grid-connection or import approval is triggered by rated capacity or installation category; grid voltage and frequency compatibility confirmed (220 V / 50 Hz)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under NEA and utility grid rules; not equivalent to BERC approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Partial gap — grid voltage and frequency are fully compatible (220 V / 50 Hz); however, BERC regulatory clearances for grid-connected heat pump equipment above applicable capacity thresholds must be confirmed separately before importation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 部分差距——电网电压和频率完全兼容（220 V / 50 Hz）；但超过适用容量阈值的并网热泵设备须在进口前另行确认BERC监管许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 部分差距——電網電壓和頻率完全相容（220 V / 50 Hz）；但超過適用容量閾值的並網熱泵設備須在進口前另行確認BERC監管許可。
